title.en: Industrial heat pump standards lookup updated
title.zh: 工业热泵标准速查页更新

summary.en: Dataset refreshed against public sources; SAC/TC238 heat pump standard system excerpts added.
summary.zh: 按公开信息核对更新数据集，并增补全国冷冻空调标委会（SAC/TC238）热泵标准化体系摘录条目。

title.en: Industrial heat pump policies page expanded
title.zh: 工业热泵政策页深度解读更新

summary.en: Added NDRC 698 nine-sector retrofit plan analysis and green-power consumption rules (Order 42) synergy notes.
summary.zh: 增补发改环资〔2026〕698 号九大行业改造清单解读，以及绿电消费与设备更新协同合规路径。

title.en: What's New — stay current at a glance

summary.en: A bell icon in the nav shows recent briefings, insights, and page updates when you return.
summary.zh: 导航栏铃铛入口可查看最新周报、洞察与页面更新，回访即可掌握动态。
